text.title: Paid Trial Task Library Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Paid Trial Task Library artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: missing library_id; payout 0 (unpaid); deliverable intangible; rubric empty (<3 criteria); missing discipline.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
